goal: spec_comap[R, S](f, p) = Spec.of_prime[R](prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.point))
proof: function[T0: CommRing, T1: CommRing](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: Spec[T1]) { Spec.of_prime[T0](prime_ideal_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1.point)) = spec_comap[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[R, S](f, p)

goal: set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.basic_open(a)).contains(p) = Spec.basic_open(a).contains(spec_comap[R, S](f, p))
Spec.basic_open(a).contains(spec_comap[R, S](f, p)) = not spec_comap[R, S](f, p).point.contains(a)

proof: function[T0](x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { x0.contains != x1.contains or x0 = x1 }[Spec[S]](Spec.basic_open(f.hom(a)), set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.basic_open(a)))

goal: set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.vanishing[R](i)).contains(p) = Spec.vanishing[R](i).contains(spec_comap[R, S](f, p))
spec_comap[R, S](f, p).point.as_ideal = ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.point.as_ideal)
bundled_ideal_subset[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, i), p.point.as_ideal) = bundled_ideal_subset[R](i, ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.point.as_ideal))
set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.vanishing[R](i)).contains(p) = Spec.vanishing[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, i)).contains(p)

proof: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { x0.contains != x1.contains or x0 = x1 }[Spec[S]](Spec.vanishing[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, i)), set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.vanishing[R](i)))
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Set[Spec[T0]]) { exists(k0: Ideal[T0]) { Spec.vanishing[T0](k0) = x0 } = spec_zariski_closed[T0](x0) }[R](c)

goal: set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), c) = set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.vanishing[R](i))
set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), c) = Spec.vanishing[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, i))
exists(k0: Ideal[S]) { set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), c) = Spec.vanishing[S](k0) }
proof: function(x0: Ideal[S]) { set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), c) != Spec.vanishing[S](x0) }(ideal_image[R, S](f, i))
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Set[Spec[T0]]) { exists(k0: Ideal[T0]) { Spec.vanishing[T0](k0) = x0 } = spec_zariski_closed[T0](x0) }[S](set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), c))
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Set[Spec[T0]]) { exists(k0: Ideal[T0]) { Spec.vanishing[T0](k0).c = x0 } = spec_zariski_open[T0](x0) }[R](u)

goal: set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.vanishing[R](i)) = Spec.vanishing[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, i))
set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), u).contains(p) = u.contains(spec_comap[R, S](f, p))
set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.vanishing[R](i).c).contains(p) = Spec.vanishing[R](i).c.contains(spec_comap[R, S](f, p))
set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), u).contains(p) = set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.vanishing[R](i).c).contains(p)
set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), u) = set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.vanishing[R](i).c)
set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.vanishing[R](i).c) = set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), Spec.vanishing[R](i)).c
set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), u) = Spec.vanishing[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, i)).c
exists(k0: Ideal[S]) { set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), u) = Spec.vanishing[S](k0).c }
proof: function(x0: Ideal[S]) { set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), u) != Spec.vanishing[S](x0).c }(ideal_image[R, S](f, i))
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Set[Spec[T0]]) { exists(k0: Ideal[T0]) { Spec.vanishing[T0](k0).c = x0 } = spec_zariski_open[T0](x0) }[S](set_preimage[Spec[S], Spec[R]](spec_comap[R, S](f), u))
